title: Luke Ross
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Luke}}

'''Luke Ross''' is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] artist working for [[Marvel Comics]] who previously did the artwork for [[Star Wars: The Force Awakens Adaptation|''The Force Awakens'']] miniseries, the [[Star Wars: Darth Maul (2017)|''Darth Maul'']] miniseries, and the [[Star Wars: Thrawn (comic series)|''Thrawn'']] miniseries.

{{Artist-stub}}
